title: ilex sterrophylla
intro: Ilex sterrophylla, also known as the Chinese holly, is a plant species native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex sterrophylla include its potential to alleviate fever, relieve coughs, and treat respiratory infections. The plant is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in various herbal preparations.
